name: Green Meadows Six-Week Bran Muffins
recipeIngredient: 15 ounces Box bran flakes with raisins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the first four ingredients.
2. Add the bran flakes and sugar, then mix well.
3. In another bowl, beat the eggs.
4. Add the oil, buttermilk, and vanilla to the eggs and blend.
5. Pour the egg mixture over the flour mixture and stir until combined.
6. Transfer the batter to a large plastic container with a tight-fitting cover and store in the refrigerator until ready to use. The batter will keep for 6 weeks. (Date the container on the day you make the muffins)
7. When ready to bake, do not stir the batter when dipping into the muffin pan.
8. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
9. Using about half a cup of batter per muffin, drop into paper-lined muffin tins.
10. Bake for 20 minutes, or until the top springs back when touched with your finger.
